deck_goal: Explain why a source-grounded slide pipeline is easier to trust and repair.

sessions.summary: Fixture review confirms the deck should stay humble, artifact-driven, and source-grounded.

slide_reviews.note: Opening slide frames the workflow without overclaiming.
Use step reveal only because the sequence matters.

recurring_issues: Do not make factual-sounding process claims without claim IDs.
Do not add motion unless it improves comprehension.
new_rules: Every slide must have a slide_job separate from layout.
Animated or interactive visual aids require browser validation and a static fallback.
